value.stringValue: Unable to apply candidate, please check the candidate to make sure they are in a suitable state to apply to this Job

decisions.name: Is_Last_Contacted_GDPR_up_to_Date
decisions.label: Is Last Contacted GDPR up to Date?

value.stringValue: Please find the candidate you want to apply to this Job:

fields.name: Apply_Text_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Alert

You are unable to apply candidates to this Job Order because the brand for this Job Order does not match the brand on your user record.

fields.name: Apply_Text_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Alert

You are unable to apply candidates to this Job Order because the quantity of remaining positions is 0

fields.name: Apply_Text_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Alert

You are unable to apply this candidate to this Job Order because the candidate has no files, a CV is required for a candidate to be submitted to EVO

fields.name: Apply_Text_0_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Alert

You are unable to apply this candidate to this role as they are missing information, candidates require the following information in order to be applied to a Job:


  • Salutation
  • Forename
  • Surname
  • Email Address
  • Street
  • City/Town
  • County
  • Country
  • Postcode
  • NI Number
  • Mobile number
  • Date of Birth
  • Gender

Please review the candidate record and then try again

fields.name: Please_confirm_the_candidate_has_Proof_of_ID
fields.fieldText: Please confirm the candidate has Proof of ID

fields.name: Please_confirm_that_references_have_been_checked
fields.fieldText: Please confirm that references have been checked

fields.name: PORTW_Type
fields.fieldText: Please specify the PORTW type for the candidate

fields.name: Visa_Type
fields.fieldText: Please specify the Visa type for the candidate

fields.name: Visa_Expiry
fields.fieldText: Please provide the Visa Expiry date

value.stringValue: Please choose the correct CV to send below:

fields.name: Apply_Text_0
fields.fieldText:
Alert

Candidate requires a National Insurance number in order to submit, please populate below

validationRule.errorMessage: Please enter a valid National Insurance number with no spaces
